message:
fix(core): flush retained autocommit txn before reads to fix stale data, add runtime pragma toggle, and clean up e2e runner

**Retained-autocommit read-consistency fix (connection.rs):**
Three call sites that manually refreshed memdb state are replaced by
prepare_connection_for_prepared_read, which also checks whether a live
retained autocommit transaction has dirty table overlap with the
incoming read and flushes it first (flush_retained_autocommit_txn_for_read).
New allow_retained_cursor_reuse parameter threaded into
execute_table_program_with_db prevents autocommit-path reads from
reusing a cursor holding a stale transaction.

New PRAGMA fsqlite.autocommit_retain (also accepts bare autocommit_retain)
lets callers toggle the optimization on/off at runtime. Two new tests
verify: (a) file-backed prepared query flushes retained txn before read
and sees the write, and (b) pragma round-trips correctly.

**E2e runner cleanup (e2e_runner.rs, fixture_select.rs):**
Nested if-let-inside-match arms replaced with guard clauses. No behavior
change.

**Trivial adjustments (vdbe/engine.rs, test files, perf_runner.rs):**
Thread new allow_retained_cursor_reuse parameter, minor metrics fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
